рҹҡЁUQIES to San Francisco, here we go! рҹҡЁ

UQIES is returning to the San Francisco Bay Area for 15 days inside the global epicentre of entrepreneurship, innovation and technology. рҹҮәрҹҮё

рҹ“… 27 June - 11 July 2026

рҹ’° Approx. $4000 AUD per person

вҸі Applications close Tuesday, 10 March 1PM AEST

Startup visits. Cracked events. Workshops. Founder conversations. If youвҖҷre looking to skyrocket your growth as an entrepreneur (or entrepreneur in the making) in 2026, this is your highest ROI opportunity.

Spots are limited. Selection based on quality of application + prior engagement with UQIES and/or entrepreneurship activities.

If you have any questions, please do not hesitate to reach out to the UQIES Instagram page, or email us at team@uqies.com.

Pico CTF & CrikeyCon Raffle
Hello everyone! This week for our event we will be creating teams to compete in PicoCTF, which is very beginner friendly (Targeted at HS students). We will also be raffling of some tix for CrikeyCon, if your a member make sure to join the raffle [here](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSeUQk8khcNeTl2bU1Zk3wvHd1M5NC6hssXxGhS7c58uhhsZ6w/viewform)!

# The funeral event for the beloved CSSE2310 Bomb
@everyone, We warmly invite you to join us in remembering and celebrating the CSSE2310 bomb,  which has unfortunately been taken from us far too soon due to UQвҖҷs new secured assessment policy рҹҳӯ
**Please bring laptops** as we will be running a reverse engineering workshop in honour of our beloved 2310 A2. 
to show respect to the bomb, **the server will now be in mourning**, with some further details on Wednesday.

Trust usвҖҰ this is about to be the best part of your week рҹҳ®вҖҚрҹ”Ҙ

This Wednesday, we are proudly hosting a talk from one of the largest tech companies in the world, Atlassian! They will be imparting on us some wisdom about security in regards to their company. Atlassian is Australia's largest tech company,  developing well known software such as Jira, Trello, and Bitbucket!

Are you passionate about building a safer digital world? Curious about how global tech companies protect their products and users? Join us for Security @ Atlassian, where youвҖҷll discover exciting opportunities to kickstart your career in security!

Atlassian is a global leader in collaboration and productivity software, trusted by millions of users worldwide. Security is at the heart of everything they do, and their dedicated teams work tirelessly to keep their products and customers safe.

WeвҖҷre excited to share that the event will be presented by someone who started their journey at Atlassian as an intern and grad, and has since grown their career within our security organisation. TheyвҖҷll share their personal experiences, insights, and tips for making the most of your early career at Atlassian.

Whether youвҖҷre just starting out or looking to take the next step, this is a fantastic opportunity to connect with Atlassian's team, ask questions, and explore how you can build your future with Atlassian Security!

рҹ“Қ Where? 32 - 215
рҹ•’ When? 6pm - 8pm
рҹ“… Date? April 15th (Wednesday)
вқ“ What? Security @ Atlassian, presented by Atlassian!
рҹҚ• Pizza? Provided (for members)

вҡ пёҸ We all want safety. 
From what harms us, and from what wears us down within us.

But what does real protection actually look like? And what do Surah al-Falaq and Surah al-Naas teach us about turning to Allah in a world full of pressures, fears, and unseen harms? рҹ“–

рҹҢұ Join us this week at Roots as we reflect on two surahs many of us recite often, but may not have truly sat with.

Inside the clanker brain with Joshua Scarsbrook

UQBA 2026 Mid-Year Sub-Executive Applications are now open!

UQBA has had an absolutely amazing start to 2026, and weвҖҷre excited to keep that energy going into Semester 2! WeвҖҷve got a massive lineup of events such as BizBall, Biz Revue, Corporate Connections, and a whole lot more waiting for you to dive into!

So now, we are calling on all enthusiastic and energetic UQ students вҖ“ we want YOU to join the UQBA team!

As a successful sub-executive applicant, youвҖҷll gain a unique opportunity to get involved in the organisation and execution of UQBAвҖҷs initiatives. From Corporate Relations to Events, Productions, Marketing, Careers & Competitions, and Technology, thereвҖҷs plenty of opportunities to explore and get involved. Plus, youвҖҷll have the chance to pitch in your own innovative ideas and watch them come to life.
If youвҖҷre looking for invaluable professional experiences, eager to be part of a wonderful supportive executive environment, and expand your horizons, then we want to hear from you!

Why UQBA?
вҖў Play a key role in QLDвҖҷs largest commerce and business society
вҖў Develop team and leadership skills while organising exciting events, both social and corporate
вҖў Join a team of enthusiastic, like-minded students who want to get best out of their uni experience
вҖў Receive exposure to suite of corporate sponsors
вҖў Make lifelong friends and have fun!

WeвҖҷre looking for enthusiastic go-getters, so our ideal candidates will:
вҖў Have at least 2 years remaining in their degree
вҖў Be an enthusiastic team player and always keen to help
вҖў Have an interest in Business, Commerce, Business Management or Economics

We are always looking for interesting people, so if you have got some cool skills up your sleeve, mention them in your application!

APPLY HERE: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfUv380xAYJ_Pr0fcmc7Nx63SbLdCuL7IT_sNnUoS9BjfT8mQ/viewform?usp=header

or follow the link in bio!

Applications close on Monday, 11th of May 2026 at 5 PM.

For any queries, feel free to message us on the UQBA Facebook Page.
